heading: Rules and regulations
label: 3316 Rules and regulations
text: The Secretary is authorized to issue such rules and regulations as the Secretary deems necessary to carry out the provisions of this chapter.
notes: References in TextFor definition of “this chapter”, referred to in text, see note set out under .section 3102 of this title
